reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar nafta  llegue justo en el horario de cambio de personal. Me hicieron esperar no solo a mi si no a todas la personas 10 min hasta que apa reciron los demás empleados. Increíble.

(Translated by Google)
I went to get gas and arrived right at the staff changeover time. They made me and everyone else wait 10 minutes until the other employees showed up. Unbelievable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCME1NMRAB

reviews.comment:
El servicio de esta estación del ACA deja muchísimo que desear. Empezando por la mala predisposición de su personal para ser expeditivo y servicial, pareciera que trabajan a reglamento y no les da para atender mas lento. Nunca vi el 100% de los surtidores en servicio, viven poniendo los conos para atender en una sola isla y no tener que caminar. Atienden de un solo auto a la vez y es por ello que se arman las colas y demoras...
Estuvieron SEMANAS vendiendo combustible sin facturar...
Coincido que debe ser de las peores estaciones del ACA si no es que es la peor.

(Translated by Google)
The service at this ACA station leaves much to be desired. Starting with the staff's lack of willingness to be efficient and helpful, it seems they're just working by the book and can't be bothered to provide any more service. I never saw 100% of the pumps in operation; they constantly put cones out to serve customers on a single island so they don't have to walk around. They only serve one car at a time, which is why there are lines and delays... They spent WEEKS selling fuel without issuing receipts... I agree that it must be one of the worst ACA stations, if not the worst.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCd01famh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre voy a cargar ahí porque es rápido, tienen para calibrar las ruedas, hay tres calibradores. Ahora está lenta la atención porque hay remodelación, pero los chicos/as siempre me atendieron bien.

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up there because it's fast, and they have three tire gauges. Service is slow right now because of the remodeling, but the guys and gals have always treated me well.
